texto: Truth has nothing to do with words. Truth can be likened to the bright moon in the sky. Words, in this case, can be likened to a finger. The finger can point to the moon’s location. However, the finger is not the moon. To look at the moon, it is necessary to gaze beyond the finger.
explicacao: Citação de Hui-Neng sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Truth has nothing to do with words. Truth can be likened to the bright moon in the sky. Words, in…” articula reflexao, verdade, finger em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
